summary: Every surface must include a named main region or an equivalent required recipe field.
repair: Add Region(main) or the missing required recipe regions before adjusting local details.

summary: Recipe regions must stay inside the allowed required and optional set.
repair: Delete the invalid region or switch to the correct recipe before adding more structure.

summary: Spacing must use named tokens only.
repair: Replace arbitrary spacing values with Stack, Row, Panel, or foundation spacing tokens.

summary: Surface and component names must be role-based rather than decorative.
repair: Rename the target by structure or product intent rather than mood or ornament.

summary: Components with state contracts must declare the full required state set.
repair: Add the missing states to the manifest or simplify the surface until the contract is true.

summary: Interactive components require accessible names, keyboard support, and visible focus.
repair: Use the component accessibility checklist and restore missing semantic coverage.

summary: Status meaning must remain legible without color alone.
repair: Add explicit text or semantic status markup so severity is readable without color.

summary: Style escape hatches and invented layouts are constitutional drift.
repair: Delete the escape hatch, choose the nearest valid recipe, and re-validate.

summary: Recipes must include the canonical primitive scaffolding they depend on.
repair: Add the missing primitive scaffolding or narrow the recipe claim until the manifest matches the real structure.

summary: Valid surfaces are called out explicitly so validation can confirm constitutional alignment as well as drift.
